notes: Rerun targeted only the eight round-1 non-pass mobile-app assertions because no post-round-1 mobile-app fix feature introduced new fulfills IDs.
Retest stayed within the documented combined concurrency ceiling of one Flutter validator at a time.
The widget rerun closed approval rejection, read-only/access-mode runtime propagation, notification delivery preference, git approval gating, and steer-failure coverage gaps.
The integration rerun confirmed the full reconnect restore bundle: trusted session, selected thread, approvals, repo context, live resubscription, and deduplication without re-pairing.
